title: Egyptian-Style Pilaf with Cottage Cheese
description: A flavorful and comforting Indian-inspired pilaf dish featuring cottage cheese and crunchy elements.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and once they sizzle, add the chopped crunchy and cook until lightly browned.
Add the pilaf, water, cumin powder, coriander powder, and salt. Mix well.
Bring to a boil and cover. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the pilaf is cooked.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the cottage cheese.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is heated through.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
